plain_text:
$ claude

> Debug flaky Playwright test in CI

- Investigated flaky `test-onboarding-flow` Playwright test
- Reproduced locally with `--repeat-each=10`
- Root cause: race condition — test clicking submit before React hydration completes
- Fix: added `waitForSelector` before form interaction
- Verified fix passes 50/50 runs locally

> /quit

Session ended.
